testsuite.name: upei.project.PlayerTest
testsuite.system-out: Starting money: $600 Bail amount: $500 Alice received a 'Get Out of Jail Free' card. Total cards: 1 Alice used a 'Get Out of Jail Free' card. Remaining cards: 0 Alice has no 'Get Out of Jail Free' cards to use. Starting money: $600 Bail amount: $500 Starting money: $600 Bail amount: $500 Starting money: $600 Bail amount: $500 Alice now has $150 Alice now has $-50 Alice is bankrupt! they have lost! Starting money: $600 Bail amount: $500 Alice is now at position 39 (Boardwalk) Alice got 200 dollars for passing go Alice now has $200 Starting money: $600 Bail amount: $500 Alice acquired Boardwalk (Price: $400) Alice cannot acquire Boardwalk because it is already owned by Bob
